PROTOTYPE CANVAS

Complex.com article comments. Controls drive the live prototype in the frame →

MVP
Only the v1 spec: comments drawer (desktop side sheet / mobile bottom sheet) with empty, loading and sort states, composer states, card states, reactions, flagging, notification settings. Hides the timeline / action-bar experiments (their controls below are ignored).
Viewer
First-time user
Shows the community-guidelines prompt before the first post.
Comments
Template
Bottom anchor ad
Simulates the sticky ad pinned to the screen bottom on the live site — the floating comment UI lifts above it. Applies in MVP too.
Margin timeline
Desktop only — left-margin reading-progress trail.
Timeline bar (mobile)
Scroll-progress bar with comment DP dots (tap a dot). Bottom = newest iteration: docked above the bottom bar, comment cards open upward.
Re-rank ⨯ essentials (mobile)
How the list nav (‹ › + Re-Rank) merges with like/comment/save. List template only — picking a layout switches Template to List. ‹ › jump between list items; Re-Rank itself is inert here.
1440 × 900 · 100%
complex.com/sneakers/a/matt-welty/the-best-sneakers-in-the-nba-finals
